global.description: The ad features a modern design with layered shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save confidently with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large rectangular shape with a subtle gradient, providing a backdrop for the text and other elements.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape positioned over the background, possibly representing a product or feature.

elements.label: Secondary overlay shape
elements.description: A slightly smaller rectangular shape that overlaps with the previous element, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Main overlay shape
elements.description: A large rectangular shape that serves as a prominent feature in the ad, likely highlighting key information.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape that adds a decorative touch to the overall design.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, clear text stating 'Save with confidence No hidden fees' positioned centrally for emphasis.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence No hidden fees

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'CoinBridge' displayed prominently at the top of the ad, featuring a modern font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Watch now' at the bottom, designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with bold text, key elements include logo, main message, and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main message in the center, and the call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Save with confidence, No hidden fees, CoinBridge, Watch now, UGC
